calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Aug-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing About Court Fees
Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevan barlow, specially appearing for and with Alveana Cox
Mr. Warren informed the Court that the trust currently has no liquid assets with which to pay court fees. Its only asset is the house which is the subject of an 850 petition to determine whether or not it belongs in the trust, which is scheduled to be heard in two weeks. He stated that there are no funds in the trust to pay the filing fee, and that Petitioner Alveana Cox has no ability to pay the filing fee. Ms. Fox stated that she is on General Assistance. She was laid off from work in 2014, and is still looking for employment. She will be filing for disability, and her household expensed are being covered by her sister. The Court inquired about deferring payment. Mr. Warren stated that either deferring the payment to a later time or splitting up the payment into installments were both acceptable alternatives. The matter was taken under submission.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Not present.

Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Comfirm Trustee & Assets To Revocable Trust
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Off Calendar
